ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Team logo */,
  "color_scheme" TEXT /* Team color scheme */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the division belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "win_loss_percentage" REAL /* Win-loss percentage of the team */,
  "games_behind" REAL /* Number of games behind the leader */,
  "points_scored_per_game" REAL /* Points scored per game by the team */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Points allowed per game by the team */,
  "strength_of_victory" REAL /* Strength of victory (average win-loss percentage of defeated teams) */,
  "strength_of_schedule" REAL /* Strength of schedule (average win-loss percentage of opponents) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, fan) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the team statistic was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the team statistic was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time when the game was played */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* Whether the team was the home team (true or false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the team */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of points allowed by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the team */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the team */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, shooting guard) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team winning the award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player winning the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Coach of the Year) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player injured */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, signing, waiver) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
